Itinerary
Caribbean Eastern - 7 Nights St. Kitts, San Juan & Puerto Plata

7 Nights | Caribbean Eastern | Celebrity Cruises: Celebrity Apex | Apr 11, 2026

Celebrity Apex
Orlando (Port Canaveral) Orlando (Port Canaveral)
Apr 11, 2026 Apr 18, 2026
7 Nights
2 Adults
Deck Plans
Replicate Itinerary
Itinerary
Ports of Call may vary by departure date and subject to weather and other conditions.
  •   Day 1:  Orlando (Port Canaveral), Fl
    Apr 11, 2026 | Depart 03:30 PM
  •   Day 2:  At Sea
    Apr 12, 2026 |
  •   Day 3:  Puerto Plata, Dominican Rep
    Apr 13, 2026 | 10:00 AM To 05:00 PM
  •   Day 4:  San Juan, Puerto Rico
    Apr 14, 2026 | 10:30 AM To 06:00 PM
  •   Day 5:  Basseterre, St Kitts & Nevis
    Apr 15, 2026 | 08:00 AM To 04:00 PM
  •   Day 6:  At Sea
    Apr 16, 2026 |
  •   Day 7:  At Sea
    Apr 17, 2026 |
  •   Day 8:  Orlando (Port Canaveral), Fl
    Apr 18, 2026 | Arrive 07:00 AM
Ship: Celebrity Apex
  • Sailing Dates
  • Cruise Info
  • Policies
  • Ship Info
  • Gallery
  • Deck Plans
  • Staterooms
  • Ship Facts

Ship Highlights

  • Embark on an unrivaled culinary journey, with 29 distinct restaurants
  • With a perfect view from any seat, The Theatre introduces all-new production shows
  • Eden - The breathtaking venue with awakening atmosphere that transforms completely by evening
  • The Resort Deck is unlike any other outdoor space at sea—or anywhere
Celebrity Apex®, the second ship in the revolutionary Edge® Series, With an innovative outward-facing design and visionary spaces that stand apart from anything else at sea. Celebrity Apex will revolutionize the way you experience the world. Embark on a culinary journey through an unrivaled collection of restaurants, bars, and lounges. Celebrity Apex is sailing with Starlink - the world’s most advanced broadband satellite internet - to bring you high-speed connectivity for a better onboard experience.

Dining

Eden restaurant features menus that deliver sensory experiences and experiential dishes served by performance artists we...

+ More

Bars & Lounges

The Magic Carpet is designed with comfortable seating, a full bar, and space for live music performances, so it truly is a destination itself on Celebrity Apex.

+ More

Entertainment & Nightlife

Expertly designed and fully contemporary, the Theater offers unparalleled entertainment in a dynamic setting at sea. Imm...

+ More

Casino

This Vegas-style casino rivals the biggest and best land-based casinos. With a variety of games in a smoke-free environment, you’ll enjoy an excellent selection of slot games and table games.​

+ More

Onboard Activities

A venue unlike any other outdoor space on board—or beyond. Connect with the sea from this multi-functional paradise that...

+ More

Outdoor Activities

​Exclusive for guests of The Retreat®. The luxurious outdoor area rivals any high-end resort, featuring a spacious lounge area, plush, stylish furniture, a pool bar and an inviting pool and hot tub.​​

+ More

Kids & Teens

On Celebrity Apex, take the popular Camp at Sea program to the next level with interactive experiences for younger travelers of all ages. The Camp at Sea program makes every sailing a brand-new adventure.

+ More

Wellness

Combining the elements of water and earth, this is the modern take on the traditional Turkish bath. Adorned in sleek gor...

+ More

Shopping

Celebrate the music of life with watches that mark your moments. Time Now offers the world’s finest timepieces for men a...

+ More
Dining
×
Eden restaurant features menus that deliver sensory experiences and experiential dishes served by performance artists we call Edenists. Let your inhibitions go and set your senses free with innovative, mouthwatering specialties inspired by nature.
  • Grand Plaza
    Welcome to The Grand Plaza. Located at the heart of the ship, this stunning gathering place has an energy that draws everyone to it morning, noon, and night. When you first enter, the sheer size of it will amaze you. Three decks open up to create an airy space that you might find in a cosmopolitan city—it’s like nothing else at sea.
  • Café al Bacio
    On Celebrity Edge, Cafe al Bacio is more inviting than ever, with views of the Grand Plaza’s ever-evolving action on the inside and the ocean and gorgeous places you’ll visit on the outside. Settle into comfortable seating underneath a stunning glass art installation and refuel with a cappuccino or white chocolate mocha, along with an array of complimentary pastries.
  • Cosmopolitan Restaurant
    Celebrity knows their current main dining experience across the fleet is one of the reasons guests sail with us time and time again. To maintain this essence of the Celebrity dining experience on Edge, it created the Cosmopolitan Restaurant—the next evolution of the current main restaurants. The walk-through wine display at the entrance sets the scene for the creative cuisine within-new American with global influences.
    Attire: Smart Casual
    Cost: Complimentary
    Cuisine: Global
    Open for: Breakfast, Lunch & Dinner
  • Normandie Restaurant
    With ties to the elegant Murano specialty restaurant on many of Celebrity ships and a nostalgic nod to Celebrity Summit (wooden panels from the ship are incorporated into the design), Normandie Restaurant features contemporary French cuisine in a modern, upscale, refined space that evokes the romance of springtime in Paris. Enjoy regional European wines, deliciously unique cocktails, tantalizing starters, and mouthwatering entrées.
    Attire: Smart Casual
    Cost: Complimentary
    Cuisine: Contemporary French
    Open for: Dinner
  • Cyprus Restaurant
    Dear to the hearts, this restaurant represents its Greek heritage. It wanted to create a stunning atmosphere that would represent the Mediterranean fare served here, so we worked with a world-renowned designer, Patricia Urquiola. In Cyprus, the menu’s main focus is seafood and features simple, clean dishes that celebrate the food and beverages of the Mediterranean region.
    Attire: Smart Casual
    Cost: Complimentary
    Cuisine: Mediterranean
    Open for: Dinner
  • Tuscan Restaurant
    Step inside and discover the delicious ambiance — a modern classical design centered around Italian fashion and film. Savor mouthwatering cuisine inspired by authentic southern Italian eateries, featuring all homemade pastas prepared with a rustic flare. Your taste buds will get a tour of southern Italy without even stepping ashore.
    Attire: Smart Casual
    Cost: Complimentary
    Cuisine: Global
    Open for: Dinner
  • Luminae at the Retreat
    Dining on Celebrity Edge is an exclusive affair for the Suite Class guests with access to a private restaurant, Luminae at The Retreat—the highest-rated restaurant in the fleet. Luminae is sumptuously designed by Kelly Hoppen and features daily changing menus not available in any other restaurant on board.
    Attire: Smart Casual
    Cost: Included
    Cuisine: Modern Eclectic
    Open for: Breakfast, Lunch on Sea Days & Dinner
  • Blu Restaurant
    AquaClass guests will enjoy this exclusive restaurant featuring clean, crisp flavors and inventive cuisine complemented by an extensive list of sustainable, biodynamic wines. Pair all of that with personalized service, inviting surroundings, and natural light, and you have the fresh and bold experience of Blu.
    Attire: Smart Casual
    Cost: Included for AquaClass Guests
    Cuisine: Clean Cuisine
    Open for: Breakfast & Dinner
  • Fine Cut Steakhouse
    Discover an upscale steak and seafood experience where service is elevated to an art form and a space that’s warm and inviting with a glamorous palette of rich ruby, amber, and gold design elements. While the design creates an ambiance of sophistication, the cuisine offers up the sizzle-literally, with a wide selection of the choicest cuts of meat to the freshest, premium seafood.
    Attire: Smart Casual
    Cost: Cover Charge Applies
    Cuisine: American Steakhouse
    Open for: Lunch & Dinner
  • Le Grand Bistro
    Inspired by classic French bistros, the mouthwatering sights, scents, and sounds of a bustling boulangerie-patisserie are sure to excite and entice. With an ambiance that changes from morning to evening, and seating options from the planter-edged sidewalk to the inner café offering stunning views of the sea, every time you eat here, it’s a whole new experience.
    Attire: Smart Casual
    Cost: Cover Charge Applies
    Cuisine: Mediterranean
    Open for: Breakfast, Lunch & Dinner
  • Raw On 5
    Using both raw and refined elements with earth tones, pearlescent accents, and natural textures, it has created a sophisticated yet approachable restaurant. The dramatic raw bar display at the entrance showcases an abundance of oysters, crab, and lobsters to choose from. The menu, also available at the Magic Carpet when positioned on deck 5, will feature more casual offerings like Shrimp Salad, our signature Lobster Roll and sushi and sashimi prepared by an expert sushi chef.
    Attire: Smart Casual
    Cost: A la Carte
    Cuisine: Seafood and Sushi
    Open for: Lunch & Dinner
  • Rooftop Garden Grill
    Enjoy lunch or dine under the stars at the Rooftop Garden Grill, nestled perfectly in its own delicious corner of the Rooftop Garden. Discover the ultimate in outdoor eateries where you’re surrounded by the open sky and the most incredible ocean views around while you savor gourmet backyard BBQ favorites.
    Attire: Smart Casual
    Cost: Cover Charge Applies
    Cuisine: American BBQ
    Open for: Lunch & Dinner
  • Eden Café
    Eden Café offers a wide variety of morning beverages and casual culinary bites. Three stories of windows bring in the shimmering morning light to create a bright and airy atmosphere, and change as the mood shifts from breakfast to lunch, plus al fresco dining is available on either side of the café.
    Attire: Casual
    Cost: A la Carte
    Cuisine: Quick Service Casual
    Open for: Breakfast & Lunch
  • Spa Cafe and Juice Bar
    After indulging at the spa, grab something fresh and flavorful. You’ll love the creative take on healthy cuisine with nourishing salads and nutritious smoothies.
    Attire: Casual
    Cost: Complimentary
    Cuisine: Healthy
    Open for: Breakfast & Lunch
  • Grand Plaza Café
    A new complimentary venue, Grand Plaza Café is perfect for a quick, satisfying savory or sweet snack on the go before or after you venture ashore
  • Petit Chef
    Dinner has never been so entertaining. We bring your tabletop to life with Le Petit ChefTM and Friends at Le Grand Bistro, and the presentation is as delightful as the cuisine-actually, four cuisines.
    Attire: Smart Casual
    Cost: Cover Charge Applies
    Cuisine: Global
    Open for: Dinner
  • Oceanview Café
    Featuring sweeping two-story, floor-to-ceiling windows, the Oceanview Cafe lives up to its name more than ever before. One of the signature favorites, that have added more live action stations, including an Asian stir-fry station with flavors inspired by the spice route and a bakery serving up a fresh selection from the oven.
    Attire: Casual
    Cost: Complimentary
    Cuisine: Global
    Open for: Breakfast, Lunch & Dinner
  • Mast Grill
    There’s no better place to sample some hearty fare than on the top deck at the Mast Grill. Enjoy ocean views and curb your hunger with a burger, salad, or sandwich in a relaxed, poolside atmosphere. Cheers!
  • Il Secondo Bacio
    Located within Oceanview Café, Il Secondo Bacio offers specialty coffees and freshly squeezed juices to go along with your meal or enjoy on their own.
  • Grand Plaza
    Welcome to The Grand Plaza. Located at the heart of the ship, this stunning gathering place has an energy that draws everyone to it morning, noon, and night. When you first enter, the sheer size of it will amaze you. Three decks open up to create an airy space that you might find in a cosmopolitan city—it’s like nothing else at sea.
  • Café al Bacio
    On Celebrity Edge, Cafe al Bacio is more inviting than ever, with views of the Grand Plaza’s ever-evolving action on the inside and the ocean and gorgeous places you’ll visit on the outside. Settle into comfortable seating underneath a stunning glass art installation and refuel with a cappuccino or white chocolate mocha, along with an array of complimentary pastries.
  • Cosmopolitan Restaurant
    Celebrity knows their current main dining experience across the fleet is one of the reasons guests sail with us time and time again. To maintain this essence of the Celebrity dining experience on Edge, it created the Cosmopolitan Restaurant—the next evolution of the current main restaurants. The walk-through wine display at the entrance sets the scene for the creative cuisine within-new American with global influences.
    Attire: Smart Casual
    Cost: Complimentary
    Cuisine: Global
    Open for: Breakfast, Lunch & Dinner
  • Normandie Restaurant
    With ties to the elegant Murano specialty restaurant on many of Celebrity ships and a nostalgic nod to Celebrity Summit (wooden panels from the ship are incorporated into the design), Normandie Restaurant features contemporary French cuisine in a modern, upscale, refined space that evokes the romance of springtime in Paris. Enjoy regional European wines, deliciously unique cocktails, tantalizing starters, and mouthwatering entrées.
    Attire: Smart Casual
    Cost: Complimentary
    Cuisine: Contemporary French
    Open for: Dinner
  • Cyprus Restaurant
    Dear to the hearts, this restaurant represents its Greek heritage. It wanted to create a stunning atmosphere that would represent the Mediterranean fare served here, so we worked with a world-renowned designer, Patricia Urquiola. In Cyprus, the menu’s main focus is seafood and features simple, clean dishes that celebrate the food and beverages of the Mediterranean region.
    Attire: Smart Casual
    Cost: Complimentary
    Cuisine: Mediterranean
    Open for: Dinner
  • Tuscan Restaurant
    Step inside and discover the delicious ambiance — a modern classical design centered around Italian fashion and film. Savor mouthwatering cuisine inspired by authentic southern Italian eateries, featuring all homemade pastas prepared with a rustic flare. Your taste buds will get a tour of southern Italy without even stepping ashore.
    Attire: Smart Casual
    Cost: Complimentary
    Cuisine: Global
    Open for: Dinner
  • Luminae at the Retreat
    Dining on Celebrity Edge is an exclusive affair for the Suite Class guests with access to a private restaurant, Luminae at The Retreat—the highest-rated restaurant in the fleet. Luminae is sumptuously designed by Kelly Hoppen and features daily changing menus not available in any other restaurant on board.
    Attire: Smart Casual
    Cost: Included
    Cuisine: Modern Eclectic
    Open for: Breakfast, Lunch on Sea Days & Dinner
  • Blu Restaurant
    AquaClass guests will enjoy this exclusive restaurant featuring clean, crisp flavors and inventive cuisine complemented by an extensive list of sustainable, biodynamic wines. Pair all of that with personalized service, inviting surroundings, and natural light, and you have the fresh and bold experience of Blu.
    Attire: Smart Casual
    Cost: Included for AquaClass Guests
    Cuisine: Clean Cuisine
    Open for: Breakfast & Dinner
  • Fine Cut Steakhouse
    Discover an upscale steak and seafood experience where service is elevated to an art form and a space that’s warm and inviting with a glamorous palette of rich ruby, amber, and gold design elements. While the design creates an ambiance of sophistication, the cuisine offers up the sizzle-literally, with a wide selection of the choicest cuts of meat to the freshest, premium seafood.
    Attire: Smart Casual
    Cost: Cover Charge Applies
    Cuisine: American Steakhouse
    Open for: Lunch & Dinner
  • Le Grand Bistro
    Inspired by classic French bistros, the mouthwatering sights, scents, and sounds of a bustling boulangerie-patisserie are sure to excite and entice. With an ambiance that changes from morning to evening, and seating options from the planter-edged sidewalk to the inner café offering stunning views of the sea, every time you eat here, it’s a whole new experience.
    Attire: Smart Casual
    Cost: Cover Charge Applies
    Cuisine: Mediterranean
    Open for: Breakfast, Lunch & Dinner
  • Raw On 5
    Using both raw and refined elements with earth tones, pearlescent accents, and natural textures, it has created a sophisticated yet approachable restaurant. The dramatic raw bar display at the entrance showcases an abundance of oysters, crab, and lobsters to choose from. The menu, also available at the Magic Carpet when positioned on deck 5, will feature more casual offerings like Shrimp Salad, our signature Lobster Roll and sushi and sashimi prepared by an expert sushi chef.
    Attire: Smart Casual
    Cost: A la Carte
    Cuisine: Seafood and Sushi
    Open for: Lunch & Dinner
  • Rooftop Garden Grill
    Enjoy lunch or dine under the stars at the Rooftop Garden Grill, nestled perfectly in its own delicious corner of the Rooftop Garden. Discover the ultimate in outdoor eateries where you’re surrounded by the open sky and the most incredible ocean views around while you savor gourmet backyard BBQ favorites.
    Attire: Smart Casual
    Cost: Cover Charge Applies
    Cuisine: American BBQ
    Open for: Lunch & Dinner
  • Eden Café
    Eden Café offers a wide variety of morning beverages and casual culinary bites. Three stories of windows bring in the shimmering morning light to create a bright and airy atmosphere, and change as the mood shifts from breakfast to lunch, plus al fresco dining is available on either side of the café.
    Attire: Casual
    Cost: A la Carte
    Cuisine: Quick Service Casual
    Open for: Breakfast & Lunch
  • Spa Cafe and Juice Bar
    After indulging at the spa, grab something fresh and flavorful. You’ll love the creative take on healthy cuisine with nourishing salads and nutritious smoothies.
    Attire: Casual
    Cost: Complimentary
    Cuisine: Healthy
    Open for: Breakfast & Lunch
  • Grand Plaza Café
    A new complimentary venue, Grand Plaza Café is perfect for a quick, satisfying savory or sweet snack on the go before or after you venture ashore
  • Petit Chef
    Dinner has never been so entertaining. We bring your tabletop to life with Le Petit ChefTM and Friends at Le Grand Bistro, and the presentation is as delightful as the cuisine-actually, four cuisines.
    Attire: Smart Casual
    Cost: Cover Charge Applies
    Cuisine: Global
    Open for: Dinner
  • Oceanview Café
    Featuring sweeping two-story, floor-to-ceiling windows, the Oceanview Cafe lives up to its name more than ever before. One of the signature favorites, that have added more live action stations, including an Asian stir-fry station with flavors inspired by the spice route and a bakery serving up a fresh selection from the oven.
    Attire: Casual
    Cost: Complimentary
    Cuisine: Global
    Open for: Breakfast, Lunch & Dinner
  • Mast Grill
    There’s no better place to sample some hearty fare than on the top deck at the Mast Grill. Enjoy ocean views and curb your hunger with a burger, salad, or sandwich in a relaxed, poolside atmosphere. Cheers!
  • Il Secondo Bacio
    Located within Oceanview Café, Il Secondo Bacio offers specialty coffees and freshly squeezed juices to go along with your meal or enjoy on their own.
Bars & Lounges
×
The Magic Carpet is designed with comfortable seating, a full bar, and space for live music performances, so it truly is a destination itself on Celebrity Apex.
  • Martini Bar
    An always-popular Martini Bar is now the focal point of the entire Grand Plaza. The Chandelier, a breathtaking light fixture-meets-art installation immediately draws your eye from anywhere in the space.
  • The Retreat Lounge
    Exclusive to Suite Class guests, and open 24/7 for beverages, gourmet bites, and live entertainment.
  • The Retreat Pool Bar
    Suite Class guests enjoy exclusive access to the indulgent, inviting Pool Bar with private cabanas and plush loungers.
  • Eden Bar
    Your senses are in for a tantalizing new treat. At Eden Bar, the Library of Plants is a living wall where fresh ingredients and garnishes are hand-picked for artisanal cocktails. It’s all a part of the chillful, playful, sinful Eden experience.
  • The Sunset Bar
    Watch the world go by with a cocktail in hand as live pop and folk tunes play. With a casual country club atmosphere, it’s the perfect place to soak in spectacular views.
  • The Pool Bar
    Enjoy refreshing drinks poolside and be mesmerized by an ever-changing mirror installation that shines day and night.
  • Il Secondo Bacio
    Located within Oceanview Café, Il Secondo Bacio offers specialty coffees and freshly squeezed juices to go along with your meal or enjoy on their own.
  • Martini Bar
    An always-popular Martini Bar is now the focal point of the entire Grand Plaza. The Chandelier, a breathtaking light fixture-meets-art installation immediately draws your eye from anywhere in the space.
  • The Retreat Lounge
    Exclusive to Suite Class guests, and open 24/7 for beverages, gourmet bites, and live entertainment.
  • The Retreat Pool Bar
    Suite Class guests enjoy exclusive access to the indulgent, inviting Pool Bar with private cabanas and plush loungers.
  • Eden Bar
    Your senses are in for a tantalizing new treat. At Eden Bar, the Library of Plants is a living wall where fresh ingredients and garnishes are hand-picked for artisanal cocktails. It’s all a part of the chillful, playful, sinful Eden experience.
  • The Sunset Bar
    Watch the world go by with a cocktail in hand as live pop and folk tunes play. With a casual country club atmosphere, it’s the perfect place to soak in spectacular views.
  • The Pool Bar
    Enjoy refreshing drinks poolside and be mesmerized by an ever-changing mirror installation that shines day and night.
  • Il Secondo Bacio
    Located within Oceanview Café, Il Secondo Bacio offers specialty coffees and freshly squeezed juices to go along with your meal or enjoy on their own.
Entertainment & Nightlife
×
Expertly designed and fully contemporary, the Theater offers unparalleled entertainment in a dynamic setting at sea. Immersive acts meet innovative technology on an ever-changing stage that displays everything from whimsical productions to edgy experiences, blurring the lines between audience and performance.
  • The Club
    Gathering space by day and a place of wild discovery by night-Celebrity Edge’s transformative venue will have you coming back for more. Experience everything from gaming and live DJ performances in this dynamic, multi-purpose space. Watch from the bar. Jump into the action. From sunrise to sunset, unexpected and engaging moments await at The Club.
  • Caravan
    Step right up to The Club, grab a bag of gourmet popcorn, and immerse yourself in unique Celebrity twist on the circus variety show. Join eclectic cast of characters, who will wow you with their extraordinary talents, in an intimate setting that makes you feel like you’re a part of the action.
  • The Club
    Gathering space by day and a place of wild discovery by night-Celebrity Edge’s transformative venue will have you coming back for more. Experience everything from gaming and live DJ performances in this dynamic, multi-purpose space. Watch from the bar. Jump into the action. From sunrise to sunset, unexpected and engaging moments await at The Club.
  • Caravan
    Step right up to The Club, grab a bag of gourmet popcorn, and immerse yourself in unique Celebrity twist on the circus variety show. Join eclectic cast of characters, who will wow you with their extraordinary talents, in an intimate setting that makes you feel like you’re a part of the action.
Casino
×
This Vegas-style casino rivals the biggest and best land-based casinos. With a variety of games in a smoke-free environment, you’ll enjoy an excellent selection of slot games and table games.​
Onboard Activities
×
A venue unlike any other outdoor space on board—or beyond. Connect with the sea from this multi-functional paradise that merges modern luxury with cool innovation. On the Resort Deck, there are endless ways to be entertained.
  • Meeting Place
    The Meeting Place is perfect for your next event with 1,970-square-feet of flexible space. Strategically situated to provide stunning ocean views, the venue can be configured for any need—general sessions, conferences, banquets, or cocktail seating. Seating is modern and comfortable, with options for theater-style, classroom, U-shaped, or circular layouts. And, when top of the line AV comes standard, the only thing left to do is close the deal.
  • Theater
    With a perfect view from any seat, The Theatre introduces all-new production shows and programming exclusive to Celebrity Apex and brought to life through state-of-the-art technology designed, engineered, and built by Tait. A new 20-foot-tall 4K LED screen comprised of 17 million pixels curves 110 feet around the stage to immerse you like never before.
  • Meeting Place
    The Meeting Place is perfect for your next event with 1,970-square-feet of flexible space. Strategically situated to provide stunning ocean views, the venue can be configured for any need—general sessions, conferences, banquets, or cocktail seating. Seating is modern and comfortable, with options for theater-style, classroom, U-shaped, or circular layouts. And, when top of the line AV comes standard, the only thing left to do is close the deal.
  • Theater
    With a perfect view from any seat, The Theatre introduces all-new production shows and programming exclusive to Celebrity Apex and brought to life through state-of-the-art technology designed, engineered, and built by Tait. A new 20-foot-tall 4K LED screen comprised of 17 million pixels curves 110 feet around the stage to immerse you like never before.
Outdoor Activities
×
​Exclusive for guests of The Retreat®. The luxurious outdoor area rivals any high-end resort, featuring a spacious lounge area, plush, stylish furniture, a pool bar and an inviting pool and hot tub.​​
  • Solarium
    ​One of the most popular spots on every Celebrity ship, the Solarium has been reimagined by celebrated architect Tom Wright, who used the ocean as his inspiration for this adults-only sanctuary.​
  • Solarium
    ​One of the most popular spots on every Celebrity ship, the Solarium has been reimagined by celebrated architect Tom Wright, who used the ocean as his inspiration for this adults-only sanctuary.​
Kids & Teens
×
On Celebrity Apex, take the popular Camp at Sea program to the next level with interactive experiences for younger travelers of all ages. The Camp at Sea program makes every sailing a brand-new adventure.
  • Kids Camp
    Camp at Sea is the only fully customizable kids cruise program in the industry. With over 500 activities to participate in, the schedule changes every sailing depending on the interests of the young cruisers.
  • Kids Camp
    Camp at Sea is the only fully customizable kids cruise program in the industry. With over 500 activities to participate in, the schedule changes every sailing depending on the interests of the young cruisers.
Wellness
×
Combining the elements of water and earth, this is the modern take on the traditional Turkish bath. Adorned in sleek gorgeous tile mosaics, this quiet retreat invites you to loosen muscles with a body polish that will leave you glowing and relaxed.
  • Salt Room
    Sit down, relax, and take a deep healing breath. The elements of water, earth, and air are all present in this simulated salt cave environment that’s believed to help treat a variety of respiratory and skin conditions.
  • Infrared Sauna Room
    State-of-the-art technology heats the air to calm the body and relieve stress, releasing feel-good endorphins. The infrared lighting system offers many of the benefits of natural sunlight without the impact of ultraviolet light.
  • The Fitness Center
    On Celebrity Apex®, an expanded studio offers new programs like the first F45 classes. Even though you’re on vacation, you won’t want to skip this gym.
  • Rainfall Water Therapy Room
    The element of water takes center stage as simulated rain showers-ranging from warm to cool, from light drops to a waterfall-massage the body, invigorate the soul, and wash away your worries.
  • The Persian Garden
    The Persian Garden pass includes use of the aquatherapy environments from aromatic steam to tropical rain showers for a rejuvenating experience.
  • Spa
    The Spa on Celebrity Apex is the ahh-inspiring escape you deserve. The revolutionary new ship is designed to create a closer connection between you, the sea, and the breathtaking world beyond.​​
  • Spa Concierge
    Whether you need a reservation at the salon or an entire personalized holistic spa regimen, your dedicated complimentary Spa Concierge will take care of everything for you.
  • Spa Salon
    The Spa introduces an array of innovative new firsts in beauty, fitness, and wellness that make finding complete bliss on vacation easier than ever.The Spa features a lineup of the most advanced ways to look and feel your best on vacation.
  • Spa Tables
    The intertwining of groundbreaking technology and nature-inspired elements reaches to The Spa’s specialty table collection, one that’s unrivaled at sea. Introducing the MLX i³Dome, this spa table offers 3 ultra-effective detox treatment methods in one.
  • Salt Room
    Sit down, relax, and take a deep healing breath. The elements of water, earth, and air are all present in this simulated salt cave environment that’s believed to help treat a variety of respiratory and skin conditions.
  • Infrared Sauna Room
    State-of-the-art technology heats the air to calm the body and relieve stress, releasing feel-good endorphins. The infrared lighting system offers many of the benefits of natural sunlight without the impact of ultraviolet light.
  • The Fitness Center
    On Celebrity Apex®, an expanded studio offers new programs like the first F45 classes. Even though you’re on vacation, you won’t want to skip this gym.
  • Rainfall Water Therapy Room
    The element of water takes center stage as simulated rain showers-ranging from warm to cool, from light drops to a waterfall-massage the body, invigorate the soul, and wash away your worries.
  • The Persian Garden
    The Persian Garden pass includes use of the aquatherapy environments from aromatic steam to tropical rain showers for a rejuvenating experience.
  • Spa
    The Spa on Celebrity Apex is the ahh-inspiring escape you deserve. The revolutionary new ship is designed to create a closer connection between you, the sea, and the breathtaking world beyond.​​
  • Spa Concierge
    Whether you need a reservation at the salon or an entire personalized holistic spa regimen, your dedicated complimentary Spa Concierge will take care of everything for you.
  • Spa Salon
    The Spa introduces an array of innovative new firsts in beauty, fitness, and wellness that make finding complete bliss on vacation easier than ever.The Spa features a lineup of the most advanced ways to look and feel your best on vacation.
  • Spa Tables
    The intertwining of groundbreaking technology and nature-inspired elements reaches to The Spa’s specialty table collection, one that’s unrivaled at sea. Introducing the MLX i³Dome, this spa table offers 3 ultra-effective detox treatment methods in one.
Shopping
×
Celebrate the music of life with watches that mark your moments. Time Now offers the world’s finest timepieces for men and women from iconic names, including Hublot, Omega, Tag Heuer, Longines, Movado, Bulova, Raymond Weil, Shinola, Gucci, and Fendi.
  • Shopping
    The Celebrity Shops are a carefully curated collection of upscale brands and products that take your senses to the edge, some of which you’ll find nowhere else.
  • Cartier
    A pioneer in modern watchmaking, Cartier is world-renowned for the precision mechanisms of its timepieces. Made with passion and unique style, a Cartier is a perfect watch for all the times of your life.
  • Bulgari
    Bulgari crafts luxury high-end watches known for sophisticated designs and precious materials. Blending the precision of Swiss watchmaking with contemporary Italian design, Bulgari watches are a masterwork of craftsmanship.
  • Tiffany & Co.
    A legendary jewelry maker, Tiffany & Co. defines style while celebrating the great love stories of the world. As industry pioneers, Tiffany & Co. delights in the unique and unexpected, and their classic style renders brilliant designs that become heirlooms.
  • The Gem
    Home to an irresistible collection of fine jewelry classics, The Gem offers guests one-of-a-kind diamond and gemstone creations and exclusive onboard pieces including the limited-edition Kallati collection inspired by the architecture of the ship.
  • To The Edge
    Take home a lasting memory of your vacation with exclusive Celebrity Edge inaugural branded mementos and souvenirs from To The Edge-including fashion, home goods, travel gear, and limited-time fashion trunk show collections from Melissa Odabash, Orlebar Brown, and others.
  • Spirited
    Take your taste buds to a unique and unfamiliar place when you explore the nuances of flavor at Spirited. Discover new favorites in the selection of smooth sipping, premium-label spirits, including rare whiskeys, cognacs, bourbons, tequilas, and more. Cheers!
  • Fashion Accessories
    Reach out to discover the perfect addition to your unique character at Sense of Self. Accessorize beautifully with designer bags, fine leather accessories, or sunglasses from A-list designers and new trendsetters alike, including Coach, Coccinelle, Mary Frances and more.
  • Shopping
    The Celebrity Shops are a carefully curated collection of upscale brands and products that take your senses to the edge, some of which you’ll find nowhere else.
  • Cartier
    A pioneer in modern watchmaking, Cartier is world-renowned for the precision mechanisms of its timepieces. Made with passion and unique style, a Cartier is a perfect watch for all the times of your life.
  • Bulgari
    Bulgari crafts luxury high-end watches known for sophisticated designs and precious materials. Blending the precision of Swiss watchmaking with contemporary Italian design, Bulgari watches are a masterwork of craftsmanship.
  • Tiffany & Co.
    A legendary jewelry maker, Tiffany & Co. defines style while celebrating the great love stories of the world. As industry pioneers, Tiffany & Co. delights in the unique and unexpected, and their classic style renders brilliant designs that become heirlooms.
  • The Gem
    Home to an irresistible collection of fine jewelry classics, The Gem offers guests one-of-a-kind diamond and gemstone creations and exclusive onboard pieces including the limited-edition Kallati collection inspired by the architecture of the ship.
  • To The Edge
    Take home a lasting memory of your vacation with exclusive Celebrity Edge inaugural branded mementos and souvenirs from To The Edge-including fashion, home goods, travel gear, and limited-time fashion trunk show collections from Melissa Odabash, Orlebar Brown, and others.
  • Spirited
    Take your taste buds to a unique and unfamiliar place when you explore the nuances of flavor at Spirited. Discover new favorites in the selection of smooth sipping, premium-label spirits, including rare whiskeys, cognacs, bourbons, tequilas, and more. Cheers!
  • Fashion Accessories
    Reach out to discover the perfect addition to your unique character at Sense of Self. Accessorize beautifully with designer bags, fine leather accessories, or sunglasses from A-list designers and new trendsetters alike, including Coach, Coccinelle, Mary Frances and more.

7 Nights | Caribbean Eastern | Celebrity Cruises: Celebrity Apex | Apr 11, 2026

Category Selection
Compare Fare Code & Category Prices
Fare Code Selection >
Port Charges: $280.00/person
Availability & prices can change frequently, please continue with the booking to check latest availability & prices. Final tax amount might change if prices are adjusted.

Select a room category to explore available options and rates.
  • Inside N/A
  • Outside N/A
  • Balcony N/A
  • Suite $8,561.95 Onwards
    Includes taxes and fees
Suite
$8,561.95 Onwards
Includes taxes and fees

click to enlarge
EV Edge Villa Suite

Size: 950 sq. ft. Sleeps 4. 1 bedroom, 2 bathroom
The Edge Villa offers a spacious 739 square feet of split-level splendor, plus one bedroom and two bathrooms—perfect for up to four guests. The unique design of the Edge Villas seamlessly blends indoor and outdoor living. With two stories of windows that look out over the terrace (featuring a three-feet-deep plunge pool and inviting lounge furniture) to the incredible ocean views Ascent, it’s an open and airy environment that truly invites the outside in, and vice versa. Edge Villas not only offer private outdoor terraces, but they also have direct access to The Retreat, an exclusive sanctuary for guests of The Retreat. Step right out to The Retreat Sundeck and The Retreat Pool and bar, or retreat to your own private oceanfront villa.
 - Two-story residence with direct access to The Retreat Sundeck
 - Large balcony with plunge pool
 - The only two-story residences in the fleet
 - Private terrace with three-foot-deep plunge pool and inviting lounge furniture
 - Floor-to-ceiling windows
 - One bedroom and two full bathrooms
 - Marble primary bathroom with whirlpool tub
 - Generous storage space
 - The Retreat Lounge: Personal escape with gourmet bites
 - The Retreat Sundeck: Exclusive outdoor resort with pool, bar, cozy lounge areas
 - Luminae at The Retreat: Private restaurant serving complimentary breakfast and dinner, plus lunch on embarkation day and sea days. Features signature dishes by Daniel Boulud
 - Unlimited Specialty Dining Package. Includes dinner each night and lunch on sea days
 - Unlimited Premium Drink Package
 - Two complimentary bottles of premium spirits or wine
 - Personalized minibar stocked daily with water, soda, and beer
 - Full in-suite breakfast, lunch, dinner service, and daily delights
 - Premium in-suite coffee set-up
 - Afternoon tea event hosted in The Retreat Lounge
 - Dedicated butler service
 - Butler Chat: Contact your butler from anywhere on board using your personal device
 - Destination Experience Specialist
 - Priority check-in when boarding the ship
 - Complimentary laundry service and unlimited pressing service
 - Priority departure and embarkation at most destinations, including those that require tendering
 - Reserved theater seating on Evening Chic nights
 - Extend Your Stay: available in select ports of call
 - Complimentary beach towel service
 - Complimentary shoeshine service
 - Complimentary use of an umbrella and binoculars
 - Welcome bottle of bubbles
 - Premium Wi-Fi package
 - Access to The Spa’s SEA Thermal Suite
 - Premium Celebrity king size Cashmere Mattress™ with exclusive Retreat bedding
 - Premium 100% cotton bath towels and bathrobes
 - Pillow menu
 - Exclusive complimentary sleepwear
 - Premium bath and body products crafted exclusively for The Retreat
 - Stateroom Automation
 - Signature friendly, personalized service with a guest to staff ratio of nearly 2:1
 - Twice daily housekeeping service (makeup and turndown)
 - Complimentary beach towel service
 - Complimentary breakfast, lunch, and dinner available in a variety of restaurants
 - Interactive flat-screen television system to view and select shore excursions, order room service, and watch movies*
 - Private safe
 - Dual voltage 110/220 AC outlets
*Additional Charges May Apply

Deck(s): Deck 15, Deck 16
Category: EV - Edge Villa Suite

Packaging Rate
The fare you have selected can only be booked if you combine another travel product to it. E.g. Hotel will be offered later. If you do not wish to add a hotel, please select another fare.
